variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 11850 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 11850 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 11850 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard LF3358 Lube Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11850
variants.description: Fleetguard® LF3358 cartridge oil filter is enviromentally friendly and features technology advances to achieve the high flow rates required by today’s modern engine designs.
